attributes.title: M-26-14 HWAM — Asset Inventory Overview
attributes.description: M-26-14 Element 1: Hardware Asset Management. Shows total known assets, Element 1/2 coverage KPIs, OS distribution, source coverage, and identifies unmanaged/stale devices.

{"datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"layer1": {"index": "textBasedLanguages-datasource-layer-layer1", "query": {"esql": "FROM m2614-assets | WHERE `asset.managed` != true | EVAL last_seen = `asset.last_seen` | SORT last_seen DESC | RENAME `asset.name` AS name, `asset.os.name` AS os, `asset.hardware.manufacturer` AS manufacturer | KEEP name, os, manufacturer, last_seen | LIMIT 20"}, "columns": [{"columnId": "name", "fieldName": "name", "meta": {"type": "string"}}, {"columnId": "os", "fieldName": "os", "meta": {"type": "string"}}, {"columnId": "manufacturer", "fieldName": "fieldName": "last_seen", "meta": {"type": "string"}}], "timeField": "@timestamp"}}, "indexPatternRefs": [{"id": "dv-m2614-assets", "title": "m2614-assets"}]}}, "visualization": {"layerId": "layer1", "layerType": "data", "columns": [{"columnId": "name"}, {"columnId": "os"}, {"columnId": "manufacturer"}, {"columnId": "last_seen"}]}, "query": {"language": "kuery", "query": ""}, "filters": [], "internalReferences": []}, "references": [{"type": "index-pattern", "id": "dv-m2614-assets", "name": "textBasedLanguages-datasource-layer-layer1"}]}, "hidePanelTitles": false, "enhancements": {}}}, {"version": "9.4.2", "type": "lens", "gridData": {"x": 24, "y": 20, "w": 24, "h": 12, "i": "d1-stale"}, "panelIndex": "d1-stale", "embeddableConfig": {"attributes": {"title": "Stale Assets (No Check-in >7 Days)", "type": "lens", "visualizationType": "lnsDatatable", "state": {"datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"layer1": {"index": "textBasedLanguages-datasource-layer-layer1", "query": {"esql": "FROM m2614-assets | EVAL last_seen = `asset.last_seen`, cutoff = NOW() - 7 days | WHERE last_seen < cutoff | SORT last_seen ASC | RENAME `asset.name` AS name, `asset.os.name` AS os, `asset.managed` AS managed | KEEP name, os, last_seen, managed | LIMIT 20"}, "columns": [{"columnId": "name", "fieldName": "name", "meta": {"type": "string"}}, {"columnId": "os", "fieldName": "os", "meta": {"type": "string"}}, {"columnId": "last_seen", "fieldName": "last_seen", "meta": {"type": "string"}}, {"columnId": "managed", "fieldName": "managed", "meta": {"type": "string"}}], "allColumns": [{"columnId": "name", "fieldName": "name", "meta": {"type": "string"}}, {"columnId": "os", "fieldName": "os", "meta": {"type": "string"}}, {"columnId": "last_seen", "fieldName": "last_seen", "meta": {"type": "string"}}, {"columnId": "managed", "fieldName": "managed", "meta": {"type": "string"}}], "timeField": "@timestamp"}}, "indexPatternRefs": [{"id": "dv-m2614-assets", "title": "m2614-assets"}]}}, "visualization": {"layerId": "layer1", "layerType": "data", "columns": [{"columnId": "name"}, {"columnId": "os"}, {"columnId": "last_seen"}, {"columnId": "managed"}]}, "query": {"language": "kuery", "query": ""}, "filters": [], "internalReferences": []}, "references": [{"type": "index-pattern", "id": "dv-m2614-assets", "name": "textBasedLanguages-datasource-layer-layer1"}]}, "hidePanelTitles": false, "enhancements": {}}}]
